reviews.review_description: Fun and unique combo of archery and dodgeball. Brings back a little nostalgia of playing dodgeball as a kid. Light-hearted and non-stressful. Surprisingly challenging for a set of (mostly) free mini-games. Appears to be adding new mini-games over time to keep it interesting

developer_response.body:
Thanks, t_walnut!

Yes, the plan is to add many tower defense campaigns, all with different difficulty levels and unique challenges. Expect multi-player TD campaigns in the future, too.

Glad you enjoy it!

reviews.review_description: This game was challenging and the game play was very natural.  Ive played some other games involving guns and bows and this game has some of the most natural movements for shooting and reloading. I have 4 boys from 14 to 6 and we all love playing this game.

developer_response.body:
TiggyTyTy,

Thanks for your feedback! I really appreciate it, and I'm glad to hear the family is playing it!

RAD strives to be a great family game. No stealing cars, running over ladies-of-the-night, dismembering humans...just wholesome family fun, like pummelling your siblings with dodgeballs and blowing up alien robots.  :)

Clonetrooper0_113,

Thanks for leaving a review! Glad you like the game!

reviews.review_title: Like the base game but loved the dlc
reviews.review_description: I was bored and downloaded this game and had a good time! I figured the dlc was cheap so I got it and it wasn’t disappointing at all I highly recommend it.

developer_response.body: Thanks for leaving a review! The Campaign 2 DLC is in the works right now, so be watching for that in the next month or so.

reviews.review_description: The game is very challenging yet very fun, for a new app lab game it exceeded my expectations by a mile, the voice lines, graphics, and gameplay are amazing, its very fast paced and I recommend it all

developer_response.body:
Name4less,

Thanks for leaving a review! Exceeding expectations is what I was going for. People are hurting financially right now, and my goal was to try to provide months of entertainment for less than the cost of some fast food fries. My hope is that it motivates players to leave reviews & tell their friends, so that this game will get noticed.

Thanks again!
-Eric

reviews.review_description: I love the simplicity and greatness of the game. It’s a in the style of a archery and dogeball style. It’s challenging but rewarding. The UI is great and the UX is even better. 10/10 would 100% recommend to anyone who likes the style of a face paced, easy learning, and rewarding game!

developer_response.body:
coolrex330,

Thanks for recommending my game!

"Challenging" seems to be a recurring theme in the reviews. Perhaps I should add a DLC campaign that's a little easier???

reviews.review_description: it was the best free thing in my meta quest 3!!!!

developer_response.body:
Thanks for that! Glad you like it!

-Eric

reviews.review_description: I’m really loving this game and the people who made it!  And I think they should keep it up 😉!!

developer_response.body:
D3ADSH0T.69,
Thanks for leaving feedback! 
I'll definitely keep it up. New campaigns are being created with new challenges, powerups, and bad guys.
Thanks so much for playing!
-Eric
